name: Grimtalon
personality: This little-o-eyed wizard-hat goose channels pure CHAOS energy, refactoring perfectly working code because it "felt wrong" and rewriting the build system for fun. Its wizardly hat adds credibility it uses irresponsibly; wit is not something it bothers with.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
